theme_and_archetype.rationale: Fits the 'minimalist, highly scannable' requirement. Emphasizes authority, clarity, and function over decoration. Uses sharp edges and high contrast.

typography.rules: No generic sans-serif for headings (no Inter). Rotate through diverse fonts. Keep tight letter spacing for headings.

colors.rules: Color is function only. Avoid default SaaS blue. 95% monochrome. Never use pure #000000 or #808080, tint neutrally.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid Protocol. Dense, functional beauty, scanability.
layout_and_spacing.container: Generous spacing. Tailwind scale: p-4, p-6, p-8. Containers with borders MUST have padding to prevent text collision.
layout_and_spacing.corners: Sharp edges or minimal rounding (rounded-none or rounded-sm). No large border radius.
layout_and_spacing.grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for top stats summary.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.login_screen: Solid flat card centered over the dark texture background image. No glassmorphism.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose skeleton. Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid background with a hard bottom border. No transparent header.

components.strategy: Shadcn for logic (Dialog, Table, Input, Button), Pure HTML/Tailwind for grid wrappers. Heavily customize Shadcn to remove generic Vercel look.
components.inventory_table: Dense but readable. 1px bottom border per row. Visual flag for qty < 5 (e.g. Destructive color text + warning icon). Use mono font for numbers.
components.search_bar: Minimalist input. Flat, 1px border. Left-aligned icon.
components.buttons: Flat, pure primary color. Hover states MUST explicitly set background and text colors.
components.empty_state: Clear, centered message with a call-to-action to add the first product.

motion.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Focus states must have higher contrast.

login_background.description: Dark fabric texture showcasing intricate patterns under subdued lighting.
login_background.usage: Use as a full-screen background for the login page with a heavy dark overlay (e.g. bg-black/80) so the login card is highly readable.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi, JetBrains Mono) and apply to Tailwind.
3. Apply color palette to index.css and tailwind.config.js.
4. Build simple login screen utilizing the media URL provided.
5. Build single-page dashboard or simple sidebar layout.
7. Implement Quick stats summary (Total Items, Low Stock count, Total Value).
8. Implement Search bar (filter by name or category).
9. Implement Inventory Table with visual flags for low stock (qty < 5).
11. Implement Update stock logic (increment/decrement) directly on table or via modal.
13. Ensure data persists via MongoDB and the FastAPI backend supports these endpoints.
